text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We planned to start training first thing in the
afternoon today, but I got stuck in a meeting that
ended late. When I finally make it over to the
track...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I get that you were busy, but how could you leave
me waiting all alone?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Even I get lonely sometimes, you know! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of training, I end up spending most of our
time apologizing to her...
